name: apsal-studio
description: Build live-action AI photography in Chinese or English, or open a legacy APSAL run, recover its references, package every Prompt, and generate each shot directly with Codex—no image API key required.

interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio follows the current Chinese or English Codex conversation, turning one natural-language idea into five text-card layers covering all thirteen protocol roles. It can also take over a legacy APSAL run ZIP by recovering Prompts and references. It exports a bilingual Prompt/Skill ZIP and hands each independent shot to Codex built-in image generation without calling an image API or requiring an API key.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，确认十三元素并打包全部 Prompt。
Create a nine-image live-action photography theme, confirm all thirteen elements, and package every Prompt.
Open this legacy APSAL ZIP, recover its references, and generate the first image directly with Codex.
